{"id":"project-LICHEN-q28s","title":"ctx_find_by_recipient_locked length comparison truncates size_t to uint8_t","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/oscore.c
Lines: 80-82

The constant-time length comparison casts recipient_id_len (size_t) to uint8_t:

```c
uint8_t len_diff = (uint8_t)(s_contexts[i].recipient_id_len ^
                         (uint8_t)recipient_id_len);
```

If caller passes recipient_id_len >= 256 where (recipient_id_len % 256) equals a stored context's length, the comparison incorrectly matches.

Example: recipient_id_len=256 would match a context with recipient_id_len=0 because:
1. Line 60-61: Since 256 > OSCORE_ID_MAX_LEN (8), padded_input stays all zeros
2. Stored context with len=0 also has recipient_id as all zeros
3. Byte comparison diff=0 (zeros XOR zeros)
4. Length comparison: (uint8_t)256 = 0, so len_diff = 0 XOR 0 = 0
5. Match occurs incorrectly

Impact: Incorrect OSCORE context selection could cause:
- Decryption with wrong keys (auth failure)
- Encryption with wrong keys (security violation)

Fix: Validate recipient_id_len <= OSCORE_ID_MAX_LEN at function entry before truncating cast, or use size_t for the length comparison.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T17:26:18.41453Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T17:26:18.41456Z"}
